name: internship-certification-blockchain
description: 高校实习证明上链系统 - 基于区块链的不可篡改证明存储与核验平台

scripts.dev:all: concurrently -k -n chain,back,front -c blue,green,cyan "cd blockchain && npx hardhat node" "cd backend && npx tsx watch src/index.ts" "cd frontend && npx vite --host"
scripts.dev:app: concurrently -k -n back,front -c green,cyan "cd backend && npx tsx watch src/index.ts" "cd frontend && npx vite --host"
scripts.blockchain:deploy: cd blockchain && npx hardhat run scripts/deploy.ts --network localhost
scripts.backend:dev: cd backend && npx tsx watch src/index.ts
